transcript:
[Meeting date: 2026-07-14]
[00:00] You: Welcome, everyone. This is the onboarding kickoff for our two new engineers. Speaker 1 and Speaker 2 are joining us from different teams. Let's make sure they're set up for success.
[00:50] Speaker 3: Great to have you both. I'll be the onboarding buddy for Speaker 1. I'll schedule our first 1:1 for tomorrow, July 15th.
[01:25] Speaker 4: And I'll be the buddy for Speaker 2. Same thing — let's connect tomorrow to go over the first week.
[01:55] You: Perfect. Speaker 1, Speaker 2, your first task is to complete the dev environment setup. There's a setup guide in the wiki. Reach out if anything's broken.
[02:30] Speaker 1: Got it. Is there a deadline for the setup?
[02:40] You: I'd like you both set up by end of day Friday, July 18th. After that you should be ready to pick up your first tickets.
[03:10] Speaker 3: I'll also make sure Speaker 1 gets access to all the right Slack channels and systems. I'll take care of that today.
[03:40] Speaker 4: I'll do the same for Speaker 2 — access provisioning by end of day today.
[04:00] You: Good. Let's also plan a team lunch to welcome them properly. Speaker 3, can you organize that?
[04:20] Speaker 3: I'll organize a team lunch for next Wednesday, July 22nd. I'll send a calendar invite today.
[04:50] You: Excellent. The 30-day check-in will be August 13th. I'll put that on both of their calendars.

action_items.description: Schedule first 1:1 with Speaker 1 for onboarding
action_items.source_quote: I'll schedule our first 1:1 for tomorrow, July 15th.

action_items.description: Schedule first 1:1 with Speaker 2 for onboarding
action_items.source_quote: And I'll be the buddy for Speaker 2. Same thing — let's connect tomorrow to go over the first week.

action_items.description: Provision Slack channels and system access for Speaker 1
action_items.source_quote: I'll also make sure Speaker 1 gets access to all the right Slack channels and systems. I'll take care of that today.
I'll do the same for Speaker 2 — access provisioning by end of day today.

action_items.description: Organize team welcome lunch for new engineers
action_items.source_quote: I'll organize a team lunch for next Wednesday, July 22nd. I'll send a calendar invite today.

decisions: New engineers must complete dev environment setup by July 18th before picking up tickets
